items.title: Vercel Labs Open-Sources Zero-Native: A Zig-Based Cross-Platform Native Application Framework
items.summaryShort: Vercel Labs Open-Sources Zero-Native: A Zig-Based Cross-Platform Native Application Framework. Vercel Labs recently open-sourced zero-native, a cross-platform framework for native desktop applications.

items.title: AWS Introduces Durable Storage Option for ElastiCache for Valkey
items.summaryShort: AWS Introduces Durable Storage Option for ElastiCache for Valkey. AWS has recently introduced durability for Amazon ElastiCache for Valkey, enabling reliable data retention across failures and expanding support beyond caching to persistent

items.title: Terraform MCP Server Enables AI Assistants to Interact with Terraform Infrastructure
items.summaryShort: Terraform MCP Server Enables AI Assistants to Interact with Terraform Infrastructure. HashiCorp has announced the general availability of the Terraform MCP Server, an open-source MCP server that enables agents to integrate with Terraform Re

items.title: AWS Introduces CDK Mixins for Composable Infrastructure Abstractions
items.summaryShort: AWS Introduces CDK Mixins for Composable Infrastructure Abstractions. AWS recently announced CDK Mixins, a new AWS CDK feature that lets developers add reusable capabilities like security, monitoring, and configuration to AWS resources.

items.title: WebMCP Standard Proposal for Agentic Web Actuation Now Available in Chrome (Origin Trials)
items.summaryShort: WebMCP Standard Proposal for Agentic Web Actuation Now Available in Chrome (Origin Trials). Google recently announced that WebMCP is entering origin trials in Chrome 149.

items.title: Orbio raises $21 million to automate hiring and onboarding for frontline workers
items.summaryShort: Orbio raises $21 million to automate hiring and onboarding for frontline workers. Orbio announces $21 Million Series A in round led by Dawn Capital.

items.title: Startup CEO Charlie Javice is reportedly angling for a Trump pardon
items.summaryShort: Startup CEO Charlie Javice is reportedly angling for a Trump pardon. JPMorgan can't be pleased by any of this.

items.title: UK may ban social media for children under 16
items.summaryShort: UK may ban social media for children under 16. The U.K.
